description: Digg AI news curation CLI — track what researchers boost on X, pivot the feed by endorser, see velocity over time.

novel_features.name: Morning AI brief
novel_features.description: Pre-formatted top-N AI digest with headline, author, summary, and source URL — designed to pipe into a wider morning briefing.

novel_features.name: Since-last-sync diff
novel_features.description: Show only stories that are new since the last sync, in cluster-id-stable form.

novel_features.name: Endorser firehose
novel_features.description: Pull every story endorsed by a given person across all sync history.

novel_features.name: Top endorsers leaderboard
novel_features.description: Rank endorsers by how often they appear in the synced corpus over a window.

novel_features.name: Velocity climbers
novel_features.description: Stories whose likes count grew the fastest over the last N hours, ranked.

novel_features.name: Trending by likes growth
novel_features.description: Top stories sorted by likes growth (not absolute likes) over a window.

novel_features.name: Co-occurrence search
novel_features.description: Stories where two terms both appear in any field, ordered by recency.

novel_features.name: Endorser overlap
novel_features.description: Stories endorsed by two specific people, showing the 'everyone is sharing this' signal.
